signals.raw:
Trump Announces U.S.-Iran Two-Week Ceasefire Ahead of Deadline | YES | HIGH confidence**

President Donald Trump confirmed on Tuesday evening (April 7, 2026) a mutual two-week ceasefire with Iran, mediated by Pakistan, effective at 8 p.m. ET, allowing time for broader peace talks while Iran pledges safe passage through the Strait of Hormuz.[1][2] Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi verified Te

signals.headline: South Korea's March 2026 annual inflation rate confirmed at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea's March 2026 annual inflation rate confirmed at 2.2% (or 2.16%), up from 2.0% in February | YES | HIGH confidence**

South Korea's Consumer Price Index (CPI) inflation rose to 2.2% year-over-year in March 2026 from 2.0% in February, below market forecasts of 2.4% but signaling a modest uptick amid oil price pressures and KRW weakness.[2][3] This follows steady 2.0% readings in January

signals.headline: Democrats on House Ways and Means and Oversight Committees failed to secure Elon Musk's testimony or subpoena him in Mar
signals.raw: Democrats on House Ways and Means and Oversight Committees failed to secure Elon Musk's testimony or subpoena him in March 2025 and June 2025, respectively, due to Republican opposition[1][2].

signals.headline: Musk criticized Democrats' stance on violent crime in agreement with JD Vance, but this is a past social media exchange
signals.raw: Musk criticized Democrats' stance on violent crime in agreement with JD Vance, but this is a past social media exchange with no new congressional, midterm, or policy resolution[3].
